author: agalimova
name: MDLM: Masked Diffusion Language Model (Non-Record)
blurb: First discrete diffusion model to beat the AR baseline in parameter-golf. 11L 512d bidirectional transformer with MDLM training and discrete ELBO eval. val_var_bpb=1.1465. Validated on 2xH100 (31 min, 209K tok/s). 27 hyperparameter experiments identified key techniques for diffusion LMs.
hardware: 2x NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3 (TensorPool), developed on 1x NVIDIA GB10
non_record_reason: Not 8xH100 SXM — 8x unavailable on RunPod (#821) and TensorPool
